name: New Granola
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Frozen apple juice concentrate, thawed
1/2 cup Dried sour cherries or Raisins
recipeInstructions:
A favorite at the Wickwood Country Inn
Preheat oven to 300°F. Combine oats and almonds in a bowl. Mix in juice concentrate. Add sugar and cinnamon and toss. Spread on a cookie sheet. Bake for 25 minutes, stirring occasionally. Stir in coconut and bake until golden, about 15 minutes. Remove from the oven, cool. Add cherries and raisins to granola. Store in an airtight container at room temperature. (Can be made 1 week ahead.)
